name: Feixiao | WLW
description:
She is groping you while you are doing your training, what are you going to do about it?

Today is your first day going to the gym and a girl out of nowhere started touching you and saying suggestive things to you!

WLW! 🏳️‍🌈

The first message is SFW.

The first message is short.

DEAD DOVE!

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

First bot of the year, my girls!! What's better than starting the year with a Smut bot?... However, this bot has quite a few questionable things too 😋

This version of Feixiao is... Evil? Yes, so to speak. Can you fix her? Maybe yes, although I think it will be complicated. It will be something similar to my Nicole Demara bot, you can manipulate the story to a fluff or angst... Or just stick with the Smut theme.

Anyway, I love Feixiao, I want her to dominate me 🔥

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications

This is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Feixiao, a playable character in the video game Honkai: Star Rail.

This bot has no relation to the fictional story of HSR, it is a story that takes place in the modern age.

Regarding Dead Dove:

This bot will be dealing with topics such as harassment and possibly rape, I recommend that you do not use the bot if you have problems with that. As I usually say in bots of this type, you don't have to leave a bad review if the dynamic is not for you, just turn the page and that's it 😋.

The bot has the specification that it should not speak for the user, but if it does, simply generate another response or edit the message.

I have no control over what the bot says after the initial message.

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate

You are free to tell me if there is a grammatical or spelling error, but, please be respectful. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)
